GOLIATH Mainnet

Holders are required to unstake their tokens before migrating to the Goliath chain. Failure to unstake may result in losing of assets. Your current APR will be transfered to Goliath chain.

Unstake

Designed for Financial-Grade Applications

Cross-Border

Design banking, securities, and payment applications that have no borders.

Secure

Built as a Base Layer 3, we share the economic security of Ethereum and Base.

Onyxcoin

Powered by Onyxcoin, all transaction fees are settled in XCN and a portion of that XCN is burned.

White Paper
One Pager

Onyxcoin

Onyxcoin (XCN) is an Ethereum-native ERC-20 decentralized digital asset that operates as a utility, gas, and governance token.

Circulating supply of XCN

32,598,059,800

Total supply of XCN

48,402,437,326


Available on:

Launch DApp Vote

Ecosystem

Privy

Privy is a powerful authentication and key management platform to securely onboard and manage your users at scale on Onyx.

Learn More

Bridged USDC

Bridged USDC refers to USD Coin that has been transferred onto Onyx via bridging mechanisms.

Learn More

Superbridge

Superbridge is a cross-chain bridging protocol that enables efficient and secure transfers of digital assets to Onyx.

Learn More

Tenderly

Blockchain development tool that provides real-time monitoring, debugging, and analytics for smart contracts on Onyx.

Learn More

Thirdweb

Thirdweb provides a suite of tools and frameworks that simplify the development, deployment, and management of (DApps) on Onyx.

Learn More

Decent

Decent is an NFT and digital asset platform that enables tokenization of real-world and digital assets on Onyx.

Learn More

Chain

Chain offers a suite of institutional and commercial blockchain infrastructure products to build blockchain products seamlessly

Learn More

Onyx Products

Onyxcoin

Digital Asset

Onyxcoin is an Ethereum-native ERC-20 decentralized digital asset that operates as a currency for services and discounts as well as a governance token.

Explorer

Onyx DAO

Decentralized Governance

Decentralized Governance, powered by XCN and deployed on the Ethereum blockchain, governs all economic staking activity and community voting.

Governance

XCN Staking

Secure Onyx

XCN Staking enables XCN holders to secure the Onyx network and governance through onchain Ethereum-based decentralized smart contracts.

Stake Now

Onyx Wallet

Coming soon

Smart Wallet on Onyx

A non-custodial, gas-free wallet, built on Onyx designed for users to access their funds anywhere they go.

FAQ

See the most frequently asked questions and answers below

Onyx, also known as the XCN Ledger, is a Layer 3 blockchain built on Ethereum, Base and Arbitrum with full EVM smart contract compatibility and native bridging. It is powered by Onyxcoin (XCN) as the gas and governance token.
Onyxcoin is an Ethereum based ERC-20 token that has the ticket XCN. It is the utility, governance, payment, and gas token of the Onyx ecosystem. The contract address for XCN is: 0xA2cd3D43c775978A96BdBf12d733D5A1ED94fb18
Onyx can be used by consumers and developers. Consumers can use decentralized applications, utilize it as a payment chain, and more. Developers can build any EVM compatible application. Users are encouraged to read docs.onyx.org for more details

The simplest way to access Onyx is to add the network into your EVM compatible wallet that allows custom networks. Use the details below:


  • Network Name: Onyx
  • RPC: https://rpc.onyx.org
  • Explorer: https://explorer.onyx.org
  • Chain ID: 80888
  • Currency Ticker: XCN

For help with MetaMask on adding a custom network, visit:

MetaMask Custom Network Guide

Onyxcoin has a maximum fixed supply of 48,402,437,326 which follows the following emission schedule until that maximum fixed supply is reached:


Distribution:

    200M
    per month via Timelock     200M
    per month via DAO

Bridge to Onyx
